def paginate(items, page_size):
    pages = []
    current = []
    for item in items:
        current.append(item)
        if len(current) >= page_size:
            pages.append(current)
            current = []
    if current:
        pages.append(current)
    return pages


def validate_batch(records):
    total = len(records)
    if total > 1000:
        return [f"Batch too large: {total}"]
    errors = []
    for i, record in enumerate(records):
        if not record.get("id"):
            errors.append(f"Missing id at index {i}")
    return errors
